conditions.applies_to: FA blended cement admixed Bangkok clay Table 4 samples
conditions.curing_method: wrapped in vinyl bags and stored in humidity room
conditions.specimen_geometry: 50 mm diameter x 100 mm height cylinder

evidence.evidence_text: Bangkok clay was mixed with blended cements; water content, cement content and ash content varied; samples cured in humidity room at 20 ± 2 C and UC tests were run at planned curing times.
Table 4 gives unit weight, strength and yield stress of blended cement admixed Bangkok clay for same wc/C values; qu values are in kPa.
